entries.text:
Verse 3

world kosmos = world-system. 1 John 5:4; 1 John 5:5; 1 John 5:19; John 7:7. (See Scofield "Revelation 13:8").

Verse 9

world

kosmos = mankind. (See Scofield "Matthew 4:8").

perfected

(See Scofield "Matthew 5:48").

world kosmos = mankind. (See Scofield "Matthew 4:8").

perfect
